sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9055" key="a)nisodia/statos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνῐσο-διάστᾰτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n9055.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">having their three dimensions unequal,</tr_> ibid.</sense> </entryFree>
